@terraswarm/gdp fails with git message If running npm install @terraswarm/gdp fails with: Initialized empty Git repository in xxx/.npm/_git-remotes/git-github-com-terraswarm-gdp-904d495e/ then the problem is that you have an old version of npm This

oblem is that you have an old version of npm This version worked: bash-3.2$ npm --version 3.10.3 [$[Get Code]] This version did not work: [ cxh @ terratest tmp ] $ npm --version 1.3.6 [$[Get Code]] Edit - History - Print - Recent Changes - Search Pag
